heading: Next Steps
body:
You can use a customer-managed key (CMK) from your AWS (Amazon Web Services) KMS (Key Management Service) over
a public network or over AWS PrivateLink. To learn more, see
the following:

- [Manage Customer Keys with AWS Over a Public Network](security-aws-kms-public-network)

- [Manage Customer Keys with AWS Over Private Endpoints](security-aws-kms-pvt-endpoint)
